skill.name: security-audit
skill.description: Audit workbook security: password handling, approval bypass, sheet protection

target.reason: MASTER_PWD stored as plaintext constant - all sheets use same password
Approval status written directly to sheet - no role verification
Sheet unprotect/protect cycle - vulnerable if error interrupts
ClearAuditLogs has no admin-only restriction
No user authentication before posting

actions.action: Verify all unprotect/protect cycles have matching pairs (no orphaned unprotect on error)
Check if approval workflow can be bypassed by direct sheet editing
Assess MASTER_PWD exposure risk (visible in VBA, exportable)

skill.name: testing
skill.description: Generate test harness for all public procedures with edge cases

target.reason: Core calculation engine - test ROP, EOQ, CMUP with known inputs
Standalone formulas - easy to unit test
SafeVal, GetArticleField, IsValidDate - pure functions

actions.action: Test CalculateROP with D=1546, LT=2, SS=200 -> expect 212.4
Test CalculateEOQ with D=1546, S=500, H=0.2*unitPrice -> expect ~176

skill.name: data-validation
skill.description: Add validation layers to data entry and processing paths

target.reason: Main data entry - validate date range, quantity bounds, duplicate refs
SecureWriteTransaction should validate types before writing
Validate artCode exists before updating

actions.action: Add quantity validation: > 0, integer for physical items
Add duplicate reference check before posting
Add negative stock prevention (block sortie if insufficient stock)

skill.name: context-injection
skill.description: Inject project context into AI agent sessions

target.reason: Primary context - read first in every session
Contains all constants agents need to reference
Session handoff for next agent

actions.action: On session start: read erp-project-context.xml before code changes
Before code change: verify target module in dependency graph
After code change: update affected XML sections

skill.name: documentation
skill.description: Generate inline docstrings and external reference docs

target.reason: All modules need docstrings for public procedures
Document each constant with thesis reference

actions.action: Add module header to each .bas (purpose, author, date, dependencies)
Generate sheet dictionary: name, purpose, columns, relationships

skill.name: performance-optimization
skill.description: Optimize slow operations: ScreenUpdating, Calculation, Events

target.reason: CalculateCMUP loops through MOUVEMENTS - O(n) per article
Batch operations on large datasets

actions.action: Verify all error paths restore Application state
Batch CMUP: single pass instead of per-article passes

skill.name: ci-cd
skill.description: Automate VBA export, testing, version management

target.reason: Enhance for CI pipeline exports
Export modules on each save

actions.action: Create pre-save hook exporting modules to source control
Auto-increment version constant on each release
